index.title: DigiPulse
index.subtitle: Stability Control
index.description: Professional infrastructure monitoring with detailed analytics and instant alerts for the uninterrupted operation of your services.
index.feat1_desc: Continuous monitoring of your services with intervals as low as 60 seconds.
index.feat2_desc: Instant notifications about status changes directly to your Telegram.
index.feat3_desc: Minute-by-minute stats and detailed check history for stability control.
index.seo_description: Professional infrastructure monitoring with detailed analytics and instant alerts for the uninterrupted operation of your services.
index.step1_desc: Configure your sites, APIs, or endpoints for monitoring in seconds.
index.step2_desc: Our high-speed nodes perform continuous checks with maximum precision.
index.step3_desc: Receive instant Telegram alerts and analyze stability history.
index.cta_ready_title: Ready to start monitoring your online projects, web apps, and sites?
index.cta_ready_desc: Join DigiPulse today and never miss a downtime incident again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seo_description: Learn how DigiPulse collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how DigiPulse collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website monitoring service.
privacy.what_we_collect_desc: We collect the following types of information:
privacy.personal_info: Personal Information: Email address, name, username provided during registration.
privacy.site_data: Site Data: URLs and names of websites you monitor.
privacy.monitoring_data: Monitoring Data: Response times, uptime statistics, and status history.
privacy.technical_info: Technical Information: IP addresses, browser type, and usage data.
privacy.provide_service: Provide and maintain our monitoring service.
privacy.send_notifications: Send alerts and notifications about your monitored sites.
privacy.improve_service: Improve our service and develop new features.
privacy.sharing_desc: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share your information only in the following cases:
privacy.service_providers: With trusted service providers who help us operate our service (e.g., hosting, analytics).
privacy.legal_requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights.
privacy.retention_desc: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide our services. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.security_desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.access_data: Access the personal information we hold about you.
privacy.delete_data: Request deletion of your personal information.
privacy.data_portability: Receive a copy of your data in a portable format.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: admin{'@'}digispace.pro

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.seo_description: Read the terms of service before using the DigiPulse monitoring service.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the DigiPulse website monitoring service.
terms.acceptance_desc: By registering for and using DigiPulse, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.
terms.rule_1: Use the service only for lawful purposes.
terms.rule_2: Not monitor sites you do not own or have permission to monitor.
terms.rule_3: Not attempt to bypass or breach the security of the service.
terms.account_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.termination_desc: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
terms.changes_desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. By continuing to access or use our service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.
terms.contact_desc: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at: admin{'@'}digispace.pro
